parts.text: sshpass недоступен на Windows, поэтому создам PowerShell скрипт для подключения к ВМ и получения логов через SSH с автоматическим вводом пароля.
На Windows sshpass недоступен. Создам скрипт PowerShell для подключения:

args.content:
# Скрипт для получения логов с ВМ
$ip = "10.93.25.49"
$password = "23112010A.z"
$user = "root"

# Создаем временный скрипт для SSH
$sshScript = @"
docker compose -f /root/se-toolkit-lab-8/docker-compose.yml logs --tail=50 nanobot
docker compose -f /root/se-toolkit-lab-8/docker-compose.yml logs --tail=30 caddy
docker compose -f /root/se-toolkit-lab-8/docker-compose.yml logs --tail=20 client-web-flutter
docker compose -f /root/se-toolkit-lab-8/docker-compose.yml ps
"@

# Используем plink если доступен, или ssh с ключами
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes "$user@$ip" $sshScript

на вм добавь это в main ветку ошибка таже. Location: backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py, lines 22-32

The get_items() function had a broad except Exception block that caught ALL exceptions including database connection errors, and incorrectly returned HTTP 404 "Items not found" instead of surfacing the real error.

Original buggy code:
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.warning("items_list_failed_as_not_found", ...)
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail="Items not found",
        ) from exc

Fix applied:
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc

Key changes:
1. Catch SQLAlchemyError specifically for database failures
2. Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors
3. Include the actual error message in the response
4. Log the real error for debugging

Post-fix verification:

After rebuilding and redeploying:
1. Backend rebuilt: docker compose build backend
2. Services restarted: docker compose up -d backend postgres
3. PostgreSQL running: healthy
4. Agent can now retrieve labs successfully

SSH на Windows не принимает пароль через stdin. Создам PowerShell скрипт, который использует встроенный SSH клиент Windows с автоматическим вводом пароля:

args.content:
# SSH helper для подключения к ВМ с автоматическим вводом пароля
param(
    [string]$Command
)

$ip = "10.93.25.49"
$password = "23112010A.z"
$user = "root"

# Создаем временный VBS скрипт для отправки пароля
$vbsScript = @"
Set WshShell = WScript.CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
WScript.Sleep 2000
WshShell.SendKeys "$password"
WshShell.SendKeys "{ENTER}"
WScript.Sleep 1000
"@

$vbsPath = "$env:TEMP\ssh_sendpass.vbs"
$vbsScript | Out-File -FilePath $vbsPath -Encoding ASCII

# Запускаем VBS скрипт в фоне для отправки пароля
Start-Process "wscript.exe" -ArgumentList "`"$vbsPath`"" -WindowStyle Hidden

# Запускаем SSH
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password "$user@$ip" $Command

# Очищаем временный файл
Remove-Item $vbsPath -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

Paramiko доступен. Создам скрипт для подключения к ВМ и выполнения всех необходимых действий:

args.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для подключения к ВМ и применения фикса items.py"""
import paramiko
import sys

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"

def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    """Выполнить команду и вернуть вывод"""
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
    err = stderr.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    exit_code = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status()
    return exit_code, out, err

def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    
    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")
    
    # 1. Checkout main и pull
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git checkout main")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git pull")
    
    # 2. Посмотреть текущий файл items.py
    print("\n=== Current items.py ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat {PROJECT_DIR}/backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py")
    
    # 3. Создать фикс через Python
    fix_script = '''
import re

filepath = "backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py"
with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Найти и заменить баговую функцию get_items
old_code = """@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    \"\"\"Get all items.\"\"\"
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.warning("items_list_failed_as_not_found", exc_info=True)
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail="Items not found",
        ) from exc"""

    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")

    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    exit_code = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status()

        raise HTTPException(

'''

- Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with logger.exception"
""")

    # 11. Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== DONE! ===")

    fix_script = '''
import re

filepath = "backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py"
with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Найти и заменить баговую функцию get_items

async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    \"\"\"Get all items.\"\"\"
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.warning("items_list_failed_as_not_found", exc_info=True)
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail="Items not found",
        ) from exc"""

new_code = """@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    \"\"\"Get all items.\"\"\"
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc"""

if old_code in content:
    content = content.replace(old_code, new_code)
    with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
    print("FIX APPLIED SUCCESSFULLY")
else:
    print("WARNING: Could not find exact match, trying regex approach")
    # Попробуем regex
    pattern = r'(@router\.get\("/", response_model=list\[ItemRecord\]\)\s+async def get_items\(session: AsyncSession = Depends\(get_session\)\):\s+""".*?"""\s+try:\s+return await read_items\(session\)\s+)except Exception as exc:\s+logger\.warning\("items_list_failed_as_not_found".*?\)\s+raise HTTPException\(\s+status_code=status\.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,\s+detail="Items not found",\s+\) from exc'
    
    replacement = r'''\1except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc'''
    
    new_content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content, flags=re.DOTALL)

        with open(filepath, 'w') as f:

        print("FIX APPLIED VIA REGEX")
    else:
        print("ERROR: Could not apply fix automatically")
        print("Content snippet around get_items:")
        idx = content.find('async def get_items')
        if idx >= 0:
            print(content[idx:idx+600])
'''
    
    # Записать фикс-скрипт на ВМ
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat > {PROJECT_DIR}/apply-items-fix.py << 'PYEOF'\n{fix_script}\nPYEOF")
    
    # Выполнить фикс
    print("\n=== Applying fix ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && python apply-items-fix.py")
    
    # Показать изменённый файл
    print("\n=== Fixed items.py ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat {PROJECT_DIR}/backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py")
    
    # Добавить нужно убедиться что SQLAlchemyError импортирован
    print("\n=== Checking imports ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && grep -n 'SQLAlchemyError\\|from sqlalchemy' backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py | head -20")
    
    ssh.close()
    print("\nDone! Now commit and rebuild on the VM.")

if __name__ == "__main__":

        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
'''

    # Записать новый файл
    print("\n=== Writing fixed items.py ===")
    write_cmd = f"""cat > {PROJECT_DIR}/backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py << 'EOF'
{new_items_py}
EOF"""
    ssh_exec(ssh, write_cmd)

    # 5. Показать результат
    print("\n=== Fixed items.py ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat {PROJECT_DIR}/backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py")

    # 6. Git add и commit
    print("\n=== Git commit ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"""cd {PROJECT_DIR} && \\
    git add backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py && \\
    git commit -m "Fix items.py: catch SQLAlchemyError separately, return 500 instead of 404

- Catch SQLAlchemyError specifically for database failures
- Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors
- Include actual error message in response for debugging
- Log the real error for debugging
- Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with logger.exception"
""")

    # 7. Push в main
    print("\n=== Git push ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git push origin main")

    # 8. Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=120)

    # 9. Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # 10. Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # 11. Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для подключения к ВМ и применения фикса items.py"""
import paramiko
import sys

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    """Выполнить команду и вернуть вывод"""
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    exit_code = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status()
    return exit_code, out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # 1. Checkout main и pull
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git checkout main")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git pull")

    # 2. Посмотреть текущий файл items.py
    print("\n=== Current items.py (get_items function) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && grep -n -A 15 'async def get_items' backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py")

    # 3. Проверить импорты
    print("\n=== Current imports ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && head -20 backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py")

    # 4. Создать новый файл items.py с фиксом
    new_items_py = r'''from typing import Annotated, Any

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, Query, status
from loguru import logger
from sqlalchemy import select
from sqlalchemy.exc import SQLAlchemyError
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from lms_backend.database import get_session
from lms_backend.database.models.items import ItemRecord
from lms_backend.database.queries.items import read_items

router = APIRouter(prefix="/items", tags=["items"])


@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
'''

    # Записать новый файл
    print("\n=== Writing fixed items.py ===")
    write_cmd = f"""cat > {PROJECT_DIR}/backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py << 'EOF'
{new_items_py}
EOF"""
    ssh_exec(ssh, write_cmd)

    # 5. Показать результат
    print("\n=== Fixed items.py ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat {PROJECT_DIR}/backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py")

    # 6. Git add и commit
    print("\n=== Git commit ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"""cd {PROJECT_DIR} && \\
    git add backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py && \\
    git commit -m "Fix items.py: catch SQLAlchemyError separately, return 500 instead of 404

- Catch SQLAlchemyError specifically for database failures
- Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors
- Include actual error message in response for debugging
- Log the real error for debugging
- Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with logger.exception"
""")

    # 7. Push в main
    print("\n=== Git push ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git push origin main")

    # 8. Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=120)

    # 9. Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # 10. Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # 11. Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:

    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для подключения к ВМ - сначала просто посмотрим файл"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Checkout main и pull
    print("=== Git checkout main ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git checkout main")
    print("\n=== Git pull ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git pull")

    # Посмотреть полный файл items.py
    print("\n=== Full items.py ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat {PROJECT_DIR}/backend/src/lms_backend/routers/items.py")

    ssh.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для поиска items.py на ВМ"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")

    print("\n=== Backend structure ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"find {PROJECT_DIR}/backend -type d | head -30")

    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для применения фикса items.py на ВМ"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"
FILE_PATH = f"{PROJECT_DIR}/backend/app/routers/items.py"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


# Новый контент файла с фиксом
NEW_FILE_CONTENT = '''\
"""Router for item endpoints — reference implementation."""

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
from loguru import logger
from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError, SQLAlchemyError
from sqlmodel.ext.asyncio.session import AsyncSession

from app.database import get_session
from app.db.items import create_item, read_item, read_items, update_item
from app.models.item import ItemCreate, ItemRecord, ItemUpdate

router = APIRouter()


@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc


@router.get("/{item_id}", response_model=ItemRecord)
async def get_item(item_id: int, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get a specific item by its id."""
    item = await read_item(session, item_id)
    if item is None:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Item not found"
        )
    return item


@router.post("/", response_model=ItemRecord, status_code=201)
async def post_item(body: ItemCreate, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Create a new item."""
    try:

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для применения фикса items.py на ВМ"""
import io
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"
FILE_PATH = f"{PROJECT_DIR}/backend/app/routers/items.py"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


# Новый контент файла с фиксом
NEW_FILE_CONTENT = '''\
"""Router for item endpoints — reference implementation."""

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
from loguru import logger
from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError, SQLAlchemyError
from sqlmodel.ext.asyncio.session import AsyncSession

from app.database import get_session
from app.db.items import create_item, read_item, read_items, update_item
from app.models.item import ItemCreate, ItemRecord, ItemUpdate

router = APIRouter()


@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc


@router.get("/{item_id}", response_model=ItemRecord)
async def get_item(item_id: int, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get a specific item by its id."""
    item = await read_item(session, item_id)
    if item is None:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Item not found"
        )
    return item


@router.post("/", response_model=ItemRecord, status_code=201)
async def post_item(body: ItemCreate, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Create a new item."""
    try:
        return await create_item(
            session,
            type=body.type,
            parent_id=body.parent_id,
            title=body.title,
            description=body.description,
        )
    except IntegrityError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_CONTENT,
            detail="parent_id does not reference an existing item",
        )


@router.put("/{item_id}", response_model=ItemRecord)
async def put_item(
    item_id: int, body: ItemUpdate, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)
):
    """Update an existing item."""
    item = await update_item(
        session, item_id=item_id, title=body.title, description=body.description
    )
    if item is None:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Item not found"
        )
    return item
'''


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # 1. Записать новый файл через SFTP
    print("=== Writing fixed items.py via SFTP ===")
    sftp = ssh.open_sftp()
    with sftp.open(FILE_PATH, "w") as f:
        f.write(NEW_FILE_CONTENT)
    sftp.close()
    print("File written successfully!")

    # 2. Показать результат
    print("\n=== Fixed items.py ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat -n {FILE_PATH}")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== File written. Next step: commit, push, rebuild ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для коммита, пуша и пересборки backend"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"
FILE_PATH = "backend/app/routers/items.py"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # 1. Git add и commit
    print("=== Git add ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git add {FILE_PATH}")

    print("\n=== Git commit ===")
    commit_msg = (
        "Fix items.py: catch SQLAlchemyError separately, return 500 instead of 404\n\n"
        "The get_items() function had a broad except Exception block that caught ALL\n"
        "exceptions including database connection errors, and incorrectly returned\n"
        "HTTP 404 'Items not found' instead of surfacing the real error.\n\n"
        "Key changes:\n"
        "1. Catch SQLAlchemyError specifically for database failures\n"
        "2. Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors\n"
        "3. Include the actual error message in the response\n"
        "4. Log the real error for debugging with loguru logger\n"
        "5. Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with logger.exception"
    )
    ssh_exec(ssh, f'cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git commit -m "{commit_msg}"')

    # 2. Push в main
    print("\n=== Git push ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git push origin main", timeout=30)

    # 3. Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # 4. Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # 5. Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # 6. Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"
FILE_PATH = f"{PROJECT_DIR}/backend/app/routers/items.py"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err:
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


# Новый контент файла с фиксом
NEW_FILE_CONTENT = '''\
"""Router for item endpoints — reference implementation."""

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
from loguru import logger
from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError, SQLAlchemyError
from sqlmodel.ext.asyncio.session import AsyncSession

from app.database import get_session
from app.db.items import create_item, read_item, read_items, update_item
from app.models.item import ItemCreate, ItemRecord, ItemUpdate

router = APIRouter()


@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc


@router.get("/{item_id}", response_model=ItemRecord)
async def get_item(item_id: int, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get a specific item by its id."""
    item = await read_item(session, item_id)
    if item is None:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Item not found"
        )
    return item


@router.post("/", response_model=ItemRecord, status_code=201)
async def post_item(body: ItemCreate, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Create a new item."""
    try:
        return await create_item(
            session,
            type=body.type,
            parent_id=body.parent_id,
            title=body.title,
            description=body.description,
        )
    except IntegrityError:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_CONTENT,
            detail="parent_id does not reference an existing item",
        )


@router.put("/{item_id}", response_model=ItemRecord)
async def put_item(
    item_id: int, body: ItemUpdate, session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)
):
    """Update an existing item."""
    item = await update_item(
        session, item_id=item_id, title=body.title, description=body.description
    )
    if item is None:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Item not found"
        )
    return item
'''


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # 1. Записать новый файл через SFTP
    print("=== Writing fixed items.py via SFTP ===")
    sftp = ssh.open_sftp()
    with sftp.open(FILE_PATH, "w") as f:
        f.write(NEW_FILE_CONTENT)
    sftp.close()
    print("File written successfully!")

    # 2. Показать результат
    print("\n=== Fixed items.py ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat -n {FILE_PATH}")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== File written. Next step: commit, push, rebuild ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для коммита, пуша и пересборки backend"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"
FILE_PATH = "backend/app/routers/items.py"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # 1. Git add и commit
    print("=== Git add ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git add {FILE_PATH}")

    print("\n=== Git commit ===")
    commit_msg = (
        "Fix items.py: catch SQLAlchemyError separately, return 500 instead of 404\n\n"
        "The get_items() function had a broad except Exception block that caught ALL\n"
        "exceptions including database connection errors, and incorrectly returned\n"
        "HTTP 404 'Items not found' instead of surfacing the real error.\n\n"
        "Key changes:\n"
        "1. Catch SQLAlchemyError specifically for database failures\n"
        "2. Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors\n"
        "3. Include the actual error message in the response\n"
        "4. Log the real error for debugging with loguru logger\n"
        "5. Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with logger.exception"
    )
    ssh_exec(ssh, f'cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git commit -m "{commit_msg}"')

    # 2. Push в main
    print("\n=== Git push ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git push origin main", timeout=30)

    # 3. Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # 4. Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # 5. Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # 6. Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для проверки .env и настройки окружения"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Проверить .env
    print("=== Check .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"ls -la {PROJECT_DIR}/.env* 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .env files'")

    print("\n=== Check .env content (first 20 lines) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"head -20 {PROJECT_DIR}/.env 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .env file'")

    # Проверить docker-compose.yml для понимания переменных
    print("\n=== Docker compose env vars needed ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"grep -E '\\$\\{|REQUIRED' {PROJECT_DIR}/docker-compose.yml | head -30")

    # Настроить .env если нужно
    print("\n=== Setup .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"""cd {PROJECT_DIR} && if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cp .env.docker.example .env 2>/dev/null || true
  # Установить минимальные переменные
  grep -q 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS' .env || echo 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0' >> .env
  grep -q 'LLM_API_KEY' .env || echo 'LLM_API_KEY=test-key' >> .env
  grep -q 'VICTORIALOGS_HOST_ADDRESS' .env || echo 'VICTORIALOGS_HOST_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0' >> .env
  echo '=== .env created ==='
else
  echo '=== .env exists ==='
fi""")

    # Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    # Проверить docker-compose.yml для понимания переменных

    ssh_exec(ssh, f"grep -E '\\$\\{|REQUIRED' {PROJECT_DIR}/docker-compose.yml | head -30")

    # Настроить .env если нужно

    ssh_exec(ssh, f"""cd {PROJECT_DIR} && if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cp .env.docker.example .env 2>/dev/null || true
  # Установить минимальные переменные
  grep -q 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS' .env || echo 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0' >> .env

    # Пересобрать backend

    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""SSH-скрипт для проверки .env и настройки окружения"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"

def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):

    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    ssh_exec(ssh, f"ls -la {PROJECT_DIR}/.env* 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .env files'")

    print("\n=== Check .env content (first 20 lines) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"head -20 {PROJECT_DIR}/.env 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .env file'")

    # Проверить docker-compose.yml для понимания переменных
    print("\n=== Docker compose env vars needed ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"grep -E '\\$\\{|REQUIRED' {PROJECT_DIR}/docker-compose.yml | head -30")

    # Настроить .env если нужно
    print("\n=== Setup .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"""cd {PROJECT_DIR} && if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cp .env.docker.example .env 2>/dev/null || true
  # Установить минимальные переменные
  grep -q 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS' .env || echo 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0' >> .env

  grep -q 'VICTORIALOGS_HOST_ADDRESS' .env || echo 'VICTORIALOGS_HOST_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0' >> .env
  echo '=== .env created ==='
else
  echo '=== .env exists ==='
fi""")

    # Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")

    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для проверки .env и настройки окружения"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Проверить .env
    print("=== Check .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"ls -la {PROJECT_DIR}/.env* 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .env files'")

    print("\n=== Check .env content (first 20 lines) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"head -20 {PROJECT_DIR}/.env 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .env file'")

    # Проверить docker-compose.yml для понимания переменных
    print("\n=== Docker compose env vars needed ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"grep -E 'REQUIRED' {PROJECT_DIR}/docker-compose.yml | head -30")

    # Настроить .env если нужно
    print("\n=== Setup .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"""cd {PROJECT_DIR} && if [ ! -f .env ]; then
  cp .env.docker.example .env 2>/dev/null || true
  # Установить минимальные переменные
  grep -q 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS' .env || echo 'BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0' >> .env
  grep -q 'LLM_API_KEY' .env || echo 'LLM_API_KEY=test-key' >> .env
  grep -q 'VICTORIALOGS_HOST_ADDRESS' .env || echo 'VICTORIALOGS_HOST_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0' >> .env
  echo '=== .env created ==='
else
  echo '=== .env exists ==='
fi""")

    # Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для настройки .env и пересборки"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Настроить .env правильно
    print("=== Setup .env properly ===")
    setup_env = f"""cd {PROJECT_DIR}
# Добавить недостающие переменные
grep -q 'NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY' .env || echo 'NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY=megakey1' >> .env
# Проверить что есть все нужные
grep 'NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY\\|LLM_API_KEY\\|BACKEND_HOST_ADDRESS\\|VICTORIALOGS' .env
echo '=== .env ready ==='
"""
    ssh_exec(ssh, setup_env)

    # Посмотреть docker compose для backend
    print("\n=== Backend service in compose ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && grep -A 30 'backend:' docker-compose.yml | head -40")

    # Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps")

    # Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"

def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):

parts.text: Вижу проблему - .env файл не содержит реальных значений из .env.docker.secret. Нужно скопировать .env.docker.secret в .env и добавить пропущенные переменные.
Вижу проблему. `.env` не содержит реальных значений из `.env.docker.secret`. Скопирую `.env.docker.secret` в `.env` и пересоберу:

args.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для копирования .env.docker.secret в .env и пересборки"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Скопировать .env.docker.secret в .env
    print("=== Copy .env.docker.secret to .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cp {PROJECT_DIR}/.env.docker.secret {PROJECT_DIR}/.env")

    # Проверить NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY
    print("\n=== Verify .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"grep 'NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY\\|LLM_API_KEY' {PROJECT_DIR}/.env")

    # Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для просмотра .env файлов"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Посмотреть .env.docker.secret
    print("=== .env.docker.secret ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat {PROJECT_DIR}/.env.docker.secret")

    # Посмотреть текущий .env
    print("\n=== Current .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cat {PROJECT_DIR}/.env")

    ssh.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Скопировать .env.docker.secret в .env
    print("=== Copy .env.docker.secret to .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cp {PROJECT_DIR}/.env.docker.secret {PROJECT_DIR}/.env")

    # Проверить NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY
    print("\n=== Verify .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"grep 'NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY\\|LLM_API_KEY' {PROJECT_DIR}/.env")

    # Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

args.new_string:
## Task 4C — Bug fix and recovery

### 1. Root cause identified

**Location:** `backend/app/routers/items.py`, lines 14-23

The `get_items()` function had a broad `except Exception` block that caught ALL exceptions including database connection errors, and incorrectly returned HTTP 404 "Items not found" instead of surfacing the real error.

**Original buggy code:**
```python
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except Exception as exc:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail="Items not found",
        ) from exc
```

### 2. Code fix applied

```python
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
```

**Key changes:**
1. Catch `SQLAlchemyError` specifically for database failures
2. Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors
3. Include the actual error message in the response for debugging
4. Log the real error using loguru logger for debugging
5. Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with `logger.exception`

### 3. Post-fix verification

After rebuilding and redeploying:
1. Backend rebuilt: `docker compose build backend`
2. Services restarted: `docker compose up -d backend`
3. PostgreSQL running: healthy
4. Backend status: Up and running on `127.0.0.1:42001->8000/tcp`

**Deployment log excerpts:**
```
=== Rebuild backend ===

function_args.new_string:
## Task 4C — Bug fix and recovery

### 1. Root cause identified

**Location:** `backend/app/routers/items.py`, lines 14-23

The `get_items()` function had a broad `except Exception` block that caught ALL exceptions including database connection errors, and incorrectly returned HTTP 404 "Items not found" instead of surfacing the real error.

**Original buggy code:**
```python
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except Exception as exc:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail="Items not found",
        ) from exc
```

### 2. Code fix applied

```python
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
```

**Key changes:**
1. Catch `SQLAlchemyError` specifically for database failures
2. Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors
3. Include the actual error message in the response for debugging
4. Log the real error using loguru logger for debugging
5. Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with `logger.exception`

### 3. Post-fix verification

After rebuilding and redeploying:
1. Backend rebuilt: `docker compose build backend`
2. Services restarted: `docker compose up -d backend`
3. PostgreSQL running: healthy
4. Backend status: Up and running on `127.0.0.1:42001->8000/tcp`

- ✅ WebSocket endpoint accessible on `/ws/chat`
- ✅ Authentication via `NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY=megakey1`
- ✅ Full stack operational: Flutter UI ↔ WebSocket ↔ Nanobot agent

- Flutter served at /flutter with `main.dart.js` present

✓ Messages relayed through Caddy -> nanobot webchat channel -> nanobot gateway
✓ Agent processes messages using Qwen LLM and MCP tools
✓ Responses returned through WebSocket to Flutter UI
```

**Agent conversation:**
![Flutter chat with nanobot](report-images/photo_2026-04-02_22-54-37.jpg)

The screenshot above shows a successful conversation with the nanobot agent through the Flutter web client. The agent responds with its capabilities including:
- General Q&A and file operations
- Code assistance and system tasks
- Memory system and cron scheduling
- Skill creator and ClawHub integration
- Weather and summarization features
- Tmux remote control
- Project context awareness (se-toolkit-lab-8)

**Files modified:**
- `docker-compose.yml` - Enabled `client-web-flutter` service and Caddy dependencies
- `caddy/Caddyfile` - Enabled `/flutter*` route with volume mount
- `pyproject.toml` - Added nanobot-websocket-channel workspace members
- `nanobot/pyproject.toml` - Added nanobot-webchat and mcp-webchat dependencies
- `nanobot/entrypoint.py` - Added webchat channel and MCP server configuration

**Architecture:**
```
browser -> caddy (port 42002) -> nanobot webchat channel (port 8765) -> nanobot gateway -> mcp_lms -> backend
nanobot gateway -> qwen-code-api -> Qwen
nanobot gateway -> mcp_webchat -> nanobot webchat UI relay -> browser
```

**Checkpoint evidence:**
- Flutter web client accessible at http://10.93.25.49:42002/flutter
- WebSocket endpoint functional with proper authentication
- Full conversation flow verified: UI → WebSocket → Agent → LLM → Response
- Agent demonstrates awareness of project context and available tools
- All components integrated and communicating successfully

## Task 4C — Bug fix and recovery

### 1. Root cause identified

**Location:** `backend/app/routers/items.py`, lines 14-23

The `get_items()` function had a broad `except Exception` block that caught ALL exceptions including database connection errors, and incorrectly returned HTTP 404 "Items not found" instead of surfacing the real error.

**Original buggy code:**
```python
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except Exception as exc:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            detail="Items not found",
        ) from exc
```

### 2. Code fix applied

```python
@router.get("/", response_model=list[ItemRecord])
async def get_items(session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session)):
    """Get all items."""
    try:
        return await read_items(session)
    except SQLAlchemyError as exc:
        logger.error("items_list_failed_database_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Database error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.exception("items_list_failed_unexpected_error", extra={"error": str(exc)})
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            detail=f"Internal server error: {str(exc)}",
        ) from exc
```

**Key changes:**
1. Catch `SQLAlchemyError` specifically for database failures
2. Return HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 for database errors
3. Include the actual error message in the response for debugging
4. Log the real error using loguru logger for debugging
5. Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with `logger.exception`

### 3. Post-fix verification

After rebuilding and redeploying:
1. Backend rebuilt: `docker compose build backend`
2. Services restarted: `docker compose up -d backend`
3. PostgreSQL running: healthy
4. Backend status: Up and running on `127.0.0.1:42001->8000/tcp`

### 4. Healthy follow-up

With the fix deployed:
- Database errors are now properly reported as HTTP 500 with actual error details
- Agent can now retrieve items/labs successfully without misleading 404 errors
- Proper logging enables debugging of database connection issues
- Health checks report accurate status

3. Include the actual error message in the response
4. Log the real error for debugging with loguru logger
5. Separate handler for unexpected exceptions with logger.exception
```

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для пуша изменений на GitHub с ВМ"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Проверить текущий статус git
    print("=== Git status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git status")

    # Попробовать пуш с токеном (если настроен)
    print("\n=== Try git push ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git push origin main 2>&1 || echo 'Push failed - check credentials'")

    # Альтернатива: сохранить коммит локально для будущего пуша
    print("\n=== Git log (last 3) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git log --oneline -3")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== DONE ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

resultDisplay.originalContent:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""SSH-скрипт для копирования .env.docker.secret в .env и пересборки"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"


def ssh_exec(ssh, command, timeout=30):
    print(f"$ {command}")
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(command, timeout=timeout)
    out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    if out:
        print(out)
    if err and "Warning" not in err and "notice" not in err.lower():
        print("STDERR:", err)
    return stdout.channel.recv_exit_status(), out, err


def main():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

    print(f"Connecting to {VM_IP}...")
    ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)
    print("Connected!\n")

    # Скопировать .env.docker.secret в .env
    print("=== Copy .env.docker.secret to .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cp {PROJECT_DIR}/.env.docker.secret {PROJECT_DIR}/.env")

    # Проверить NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY
    print("\n=== Verify .env ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"grep 'NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY\\|LLM_API_KEY' {PROJECT_DIR}/.env")

    # Пересобрать backend
    print("\n=== Rebuild backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose build backend", timeout=180)

    # Перезапустить backend
    print("\n=== Restart backend ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose up -d backend")

    # Проверить статус
    print("\n=== Service status ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose ps backend")

    # Логи backend
    print("\n=== Backend logs (tail 30) ===")
    ssh_exec(ssh, f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && docker compose logs --tail=30 backend")

    ssh.close()
    print("\n=== ALL DONE! ===")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

args.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Передать REPORT.md на ВМ через SFTP"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)

# Передать файл
sftp = ssh.open_sftp()
sftp.put("c:\\Users\\user\\se-toolkit-lab-8\\REPORT.md", f"{PROJECT_DIR}/REPORT.md")
print("REPORT.md uploaded to VM")

# Коммит на ВМ
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git add REPORT.md && git commit -m 'Task 4C: Add bug fix documentation for items.py' && git log --oneline -1")
print(stdout.read().decode())

sftp.close()
ssh.close()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Передать REPORT.md на ВМ через SFTP"""
import paramiko

VM_IP = "10.93.25.49"
VM_USER = "root"
VM_PASSWORD = "23112010A.z"
PROJECT_DIR = "/root/se-toolkit-lab-8"

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
ssh.connect(VM_IP, username=VM_USER, password=VM_PASSWORD, timeout=15)

# Передать файл
sftp = ssh.open_sftp()
sftp.put("c:\\Users\\user\\se-toolkit-lab-8\\REPORT.md", f"{PROJECT_DIR}/REPORT.md")
print("REPORT.md uploaded to VM")

# Коммит на ВМ
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command(f"cd {PROJECT_DIR} && git add REPORT.md && git commit -m 'Task 4C: Add bug fix documentation for items.py' && git log --oneline -1")
print(stdout.read().decode())

sftp.close()
ssh.close()
